title: Macaw's Abnormals
description: This mod is a multi-compatibility for the mods developed by the Abnormals Team. Whether it is Buzzier Bees, Environmental or Upgrade Aquatic.
body:
This mod is a multi-compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs and the mods created by Abnormals Team.
The mod will automatically add bridges/roofs or fences with materials from other mods.

 
I had installed Macaw's Bridges - Abnormals, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed.
Don't worry, this mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.

This mod is a unoficial addons of macaw's mods, if mod will be crash and bug please report in this [issue](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues).

This mod supported :  

- Macaw's Bridges
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/c31eabc8a3940f7e3ad1b4294b709d7aeea1911d.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/c31eabc8a3940f7e3ad1b4294b709d7aeea1911d.png)
- Macaw's Roofs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/cca8f153d896d8a1d37691f503f8c55c9f196780.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/cca8f153d896d8a1d37691f503f8c55c9f196780.png)
- Macaw's Fences
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/9ebf067ac442acfd2e764a8c0515ddac10082b71.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/9ebf067ac442acfd2e764a8c0515ddac10082b71.png)
- Macaw's Furnitures
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/bdf41da17f2a7f0c2ac5caeee70c04e551d9ac76.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/bdf41da17f2a7f0c2ac5caeee70c04e551d9ac76.png)
- Macaw's Stairs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/166e26bac2227526c4c2d1a32ac8777dd22ca00a.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/166e26bac2227526c4c2d1a32ac8777dd22ca00a.png)

1.1 Update
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/5aaba117ceede98dac715cb13808d1d5b0f1c625.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jZrq3qzM/images/5aaba117ceede98dac715cb13808d1d5b0f1c625.png)

Required Depedency:

- [AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)
- [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)

Optional Dependency:

- [Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)

_Abnormals Supports :_

- [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees)
- [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)
- [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)
- [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity)
- [The Endergetic Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/endergetic)
- [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric)
- [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)
